title: lithocarpus fordianus
intro: Lithocarpus fordianus, also known as the Chinese copper beech, is a deciduous tree species native to China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, as well as having potential anti-cancer and anti-diabetic properties. The herbal preparations of Lithocarpus fordianus include decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, capsules, or ointments for various health conditions.
